name: Cottage Cheese Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Sliced green onion or chives
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange lettuce cups on one large or several small plates.
2. In a bowl, combine cottage cheese, radishes, onions, mayonnaise (if using), salt, and pepper.
3. Spoon the mixture into the lettuce cups or serve in the bowl.
4. Sprinkle with paprika.
5. Serve.
